Data Structure (JSONL Format):
{
  "timestamp": "ISO8601",
  "sender": "username",
  "sender_id": "unique_id",
  "text": "message content",
  "category": "setup_help|newsletter|product_inquiry|partnership",
  "response_sent": "auto-response text or null",
  "flagged": true/false,
  "flagged_reason": "high-value partnership or null"
}
